• Displays random anime boy images from a filtered API with color palette information
  • Uses a proxy to bypass CORS restrictions and fetch data from the Nekos API
  • Shows image details including ID, rating, tags, source link, and color swatches
    const targetUrl = "https://api.nekosapi.com/v4/images/random?limit=1&tags=boy&rating=safe&without_tags=girl,pussy,exposed_girl_breasts";
    document.getElementById("content").innerHTML = ``;

This web application fetches and displays filtered anime boy images from an API, showing color palettes and metadata. Users can click a button to load new random images, with error handling for failed requests. The interface features a playful design with Comic Sans font and gradient backgrounds.
